meaning: n.顽皮的人,爱开玩笑的人
examples: My dad was a Merry Prankster before that.
Whatever the trick, if the innocent victim falls for the joke the prankster yells, April Fool!
Nabokov, the authorial prankster, buried Easter eggs of every sort for careful readers to unearth.
But can it keep its balance when a prankster yanks the carpet out from under it?
Some prankster had scanned Bhatt's face on to a skimpily clad body and put the result on the Web.
